programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: A belligerent suspect strips naked during his arrest; an officer responds to an armed robbery at a liquor store; deputies save a woman trapped in a house fire.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: A vehicle is taken with kids in the back seat; a Florida man blames a horse for a robbery; an officer defends himself after being attacked with a sword.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: A trooper's cruiser is totaled on the freeway; a country music singer gets mouthy during a DUI arrest; a helicopter chase leads to a shootout in Florida.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: Tulsa, Okla., officers pursue a stolen pickup truck; Cleveland police respond to a man breaking windows at a church; Pasco County, Fla., deputies apprehend a fleeing suspect in a foot chase.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: Pennsylvania troopers caught in a roadside gunfight; Utah Department of Public Safety helicopter tracks stolen vehicle; officers drive shooting victim to the hospital when EMS is delayed.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: An angry man threatens officers with a rifle; a traffic stop escalates into a dramatic shoot-out; officers commandeer a jet ski to make a water rescue.
